title: Ahtna Will No Longer Issue Land Crossing Permits for State-Sponsored Bison Hunting Permits DI 450 & 454
summary: Glennallen, Alaska – Until further notice, Ahtna, Incorporated will no longer issue land access permits for hunting bison associated with the Alaska Department of Fish and Game (ADF&G) Permit Nos.
